summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of luxury jewelry website redesign. All 9 requested features successfully implemented and verified: luxury Playfair Display typography, local jewelry data with 12 products across 4 categories, elegant product cards with hover effects, functional e-commerce workflows, gold accent colors, and 4-section collections showcase.
passed_tests: Home page displays luxury design with 'Timeless Elegance' header using Playfair Display typography
All 12 jewelry products loaded from local data (jewelryProducts.js) instead of external API
Product cards show elegant styling with hover effects and 'Quick View' overlay animation
Navbar displays all 4 jewelry categories: Rings, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets with proper navigation
Rings category page loads 4 ring products with proper filtering
Necklaces category page loads 3 necklace products with proper filtering
Earrings category page loads 3 earring products with proper filtering
Bracelets category page loads 2 bracelet products with proper filtering
Product detail pages display jewelry with functional 'Add to Cart' button
Add to Cart functionality works correctly and redirects to cart page
Cart page shows multiple items with proper calculations (tested $7,650 total)
CHECKOUT button present with black luxury styling (#1A1A1A)
Collections section displays 4 jewelry categories with beautiful images and hover effects
Gold accent color (#D4AF37) properly implemented in hero text and UI elements
Search functionality works correctly on category pages (filtered 'diamond' search)
Typography consistency: 100% Playfair Display for headings, 100% Montserrat for body text
Navigation links work correctly for all jewelry categories
Responsive product cards with proper aspect ratios and spacing
Footer displays with proper contrast and organized sections
No visible errors or console issues detected
